data.name: Nude and Afraid: 11 Day Challenge
data.detailed_description:
Take a dating survival challenge for 11 days, where the participants are nude and start with nothing. During this time, you'll not only romance your partner, but you will be hunting, foraging, and crafting in 4 different biomes: Forest, Jungle, Canyon, Demon Realm. The game combines elements of magic and fantasy with the survival experience to make the combat more interesting.

Each biome has its own unique areas to explore. You'll be chopping down trees, mining ores and gems, as well as fighting the various monsters. You can also fish or hunt wild animals depending on the biome.

You will need to cook and feed yourself and your partner. Hydrate yourself by finding a source of water or crafting a Ring of Water. You'll also need to build a fence to keep monsters at bay at night.

In terms dating, you'll have 4 different partners to choose from, each with their own backstory and personalities. You'll get to know them and get to romance them as you survive together in the wild. The game features animated, uncensored adult content and is intended for mature audiences only.

data.short_description: Take part in a 11 day dating survival challenge with four different partners in various biomes. You'll hunt, craft, forage, and defend your camp, as you romance your partner and build a relationship that goes beyond the challenge.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
